zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia於1302年出生在羅馬尼亞阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯時，她的父親Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei33歲，母親Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia22歲。她於從1345年到1349年與Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria在保加利亞結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年在保加利亞Велико ТърновоВелико Търново享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Basaraba
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ukrainian, Rusyn, Moldovan, Romanian, and Polish: from Basarab, an ethnic name for someone from Bessarabia, now Moldova, or, in a transferred sense, for a Wallachian (see Vlachos ).

variants.name: Vlachos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Christos, Constantine, Dimitrios, Haralambos, Konstantinos, Koula, Labros, Pantelis, Stamatios, Vaios, Vasilios.

Greek: ethnic name for an Aromanian or Vlach, a member of Romanized, traditionally pastoralist population living in the Balkans, speaking a language closely related to Romanian. Through ethnic stereotyping, the Greek ethnic name, which is cognate with Slavic Vlah (see Vlasic ), came to denote a highlander. Any of these senses could be involved in the development of the surname. It is also a shortened form of compound surnames beginning with Vlach-, for example Vlachogiannis, meaning ‘John the Aromanian, John the hillbilly’, and Vlachakis (see Vlahakis ). Compare Vlahos .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Theodora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Theodore  , borne most notably by a 9th-century empress of Byzantium, the wife of Theophilus the Iconoclast. It means ‘gift of God’ the elements are the same as those of   Dorothea  , but in reverse order.

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Convert"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of French Couvert or its Dutch form Coevert, see Covert .

variants.name: Covert
meanings: English (Surrey, of Norman origin): habitational name from the Norman hamlet of Couvert in Calvados or from some other locality similarly named from Old French (le) covert ‘the secret corner, refuge, or thicket’. Sussex surname forms with the definite article and no preposition are not nicknames from Old French covert ‘secret(ive)’, as has been suggested, but are either references to ‘Le Covert’ as the place of origin or represent the common Norman practice of substituting le for de in surnames. This surname is now extinct in Britain.
Americanized form of an unidentified Dutch or German name, perhaps   Kofoed   or German   Gobert  .

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia was born in 1302, in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania, her father, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, was 33 and her mother, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, was 22. She married Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria from 1345 to 1349, in Bulgaria. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1367, in Veliko Tŭrnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia est née en 1302, à Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Roumanie, son père, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria du 1345 au 1349, à Bulgarie. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1367, à Veliko Tŭrnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgarie, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia 1302 in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumänien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia 22. Sie hat von 1345 bis 1349 in Bulgarien Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1367 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Veliko Tŭrnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgarien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia è nata il nel 1302 nel Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania, sua padre, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria da 1345 a 1349, nel Bulgaria. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1367, nel Veliko Tŭrnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia(이)가 1302년 루마니아 아그s 커테아 데 아그s에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1345년 부터 1349년 까지 불가리아에서 Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 불가리아 Велико Търново Велико Търново에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia nasceu em 1302, em Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romênia, seu pai, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria de 1345 a 1349, em Bulgária. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1367, em Veliko Tŭrnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgária, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia родилась в 1302 г. в местности куртеа де аргеs, аргеs, Румыния, её отцу по имени Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria с 1345 по 1349 в местности Болгария. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1367 г. в местности Велико Търново, Велико Търново, Болгария в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia nació en 1302, en Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumania, su papá, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria desde 1345 hasta 1349, en Bulgaria. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1367, en Veliko Tŭrnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria, a la edad de 65 años.
